concerns.text: Missing task for US-4 (Human Data Collection). T023-T026 only cover data loading and synthetic data generation for testing. There is no task to implement the actual data collection interface or process to gather real human observer responses (≥5 participants) required by SC-005 and US-4 acceptance scenario 1.

Missing explicit task to validate manifest parameter linkage. While T013 generates the manifest, there is no specific task to verify that every generated image is linked to its exact flanker count and eccentricity values as required by Constitution Principle VI and FR-002. T012 mentions logging errors but not validating the manifest completeness.

Missing task for chunked processing fallback. The spec Edge Cases require handling datasets exceeding 7 GB RAM via chunked processing or sampling. T019 mentions chunked processing for memory, but there is no explicit task to implement the fallback mechanism (sampling) if chunking is insufficient, which is a critical constraint for the GitHub Actions free-tier.

T010 references 'official source ()' with an empty URL. While FR-001 in the spec also has this issue, the task should ideally reference the specific HuggingFace dataset ID or URL to ensure the implementer knows exactly where to fetch the RAVDESS dataset, preventing ambiguity.
